title: Kitchen Drawer Liners 30cm x 100cm | Cupboard Liners Non Slip PVC Mat Shelf Protector for Fridge Kitchen Cabinets that Protects Against Spills
features: NON-SLIP & NON-ADHESIVE DESIGN – Featuring a dot-textured surface for enhanced grip, this kitchen drawer liner stays in place without sticky residue. The smooth side allows easy positioning, ensuring a clean and reusable liner.

DURABLE & FOOD-GRADE MATERIAL – Made from premium BPA-free EVA material, this cabinet liner is soft, odorless, and safe for direct contact with fruits and vegetables. Protects shelves, drawers, and countertops from scratches, stains, and moisture.

EASY TO CUT & CUSTOMIZE – The 30cm x 100cm fridge liner can be easily trimmed with scissors or a utility knife to fit any shape or size. Use removable double-sided tape for extra grip in drawers, cabinets, or refrigerators.

MULTI-PURPOSE USE – This shelf liner for kitchen cabinets works as a refrigerator mat, cupboard liner, desk protector, drawer pad, or countertop cover. Ideal for home, kitchen, office, and storage spaces.

WATERPROOF & EASY TO CLEAN – The PVC kitchen cabinet liner repels water, preventing spills and stains. Simply wipe with a damp cloth or rinse under water to keep it looking fresh and new for long-lasting use.
description: Product Description Non-Slip Design for Secure Grip : Featuring a dot-textured surface, this drawer liner stays firmly in place without slipping, ensuring your kitchen essentials remain stable. Non-Adhesive & Residue-Free : No sticky glue required! The smooth underside allows easy repositioning and removal without leaving residue on shelves or drawers. Durable & High-Quality PVC Material : Made from premium BPA-free EVA, this liner is strong, flexible, and long-lasting, offering superior protection against spills and stains. Safe for Direct Food Contact : Crafted from food-grade material, this cabinet liner is odorless, non-toxic, and safe for storing fresh fruits, vegetables, and pantry items. Protects Against Scratches & Stains : Shields your kitchen drawers, shelves, and countertops from spills, scratches, and daily wear, extending their lifespan. Waterproof & Moisture-Resistant : Designed to repel water, this fridge liner prevents liquid damage, making it perfect for kitchen cabinets, refrigerators, and storage spaces. Easily Cut to Fit Any Size : Measuring 30cm x 100cm , this shelf liner can be trimmed with scissors for a perfect custom fit in any drawer, shelf, or fridge compartment. Multi-Purpose Shelf Liner : Ideal for kitchen cabinets, pantry shelves, desk drawers, bathroom storage, and even as a craft mat or workspace protector. Enhances Kitchen Organization : Keeps your shelves clean and tidy by preventing dust buildup and ensuring your items stay neatly arranged. Simple & Hassle-Free Installation : Just unroll, trim if needed, and place it down—no adhesives or special tools required for a perfect fit. Lightweight Yet Sturdy Construction : Designed for daily use, this protective liner withstands frequent cleaning and rearranging without tearing or wearing out. Reduces Noise from Moving Items : Acts as a cushion to minimize noise when placing dishes, utensils, or appliances in drawers and cabinets. Ideal for Refrigerators & Freezers : Keeps fridge shelves clean by catching spills and crumbs, making it easy to wipe away messes. Great for Office & Home Use : Works as a desk mat, shelf protector, or even a shoe rack liner, ensuring versatile use beyond the kitchen. Prevents Slipping of Glassware & Plates : Keeps fragile items secure in cabinets, reducing the risk of accidental breakage. Stylish & Modern Look : The sleek, neutral design blends seamlessly with any kitchen décor while adding a fresh, clean touch to your shelves. Easy to Wipe Clean & Maintain : Simply rinse under water or wipe with a damp cloth to remove stains, crumbs, or dust in seconds. Reusable & Long-Lasting Performance : Unlike paper or fabric liners, this PVC mat is designed for repeated use, saving you money in the long run.
